dream_text: I was lying on a quiet beach in late afternoon light. The water was calm. I felt completely safe — not watchful, not nervous, just safe — and stayed there until the dream ended.

insight.notice: The strongest part is the complete sense of safety: you could simply rest without needing to stay alert. The calm water and late-afternoon light hold that feeling steady through the end of the dream.

pattern_candidates.label: complete safety
pattern_candidates.evidence: You explicitly felt completely safe, not watchful or nervous.

pattern_candidates.label: quiet beach
pattern_candidates.evidence: You were lying on a quiet beach beside calm water in late-afternoon light.

pattern_candidates.label: resting without vigilance
pattern_candidates.evidence: You stayed lying there safely until the dream ended.
